name: Kruegel Park
description: Come play pickleball at Kruegel Park in Pullman, WA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Schmuck Park
description: Come play pickleball at Schmuck Park in Colfax, WA! There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free.

name: Sunnyside Park
description: Come play pickleball at Sunnyside Park in Pullman, WA! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.
